g.text: instantly takes M1 M2 M3 from pool
Job running on M1 M2 M3

svg.text: Machines NOT deleted — returned to pool. Ready for next cluster!
Key insight — without pool vs with pool
Without pool: cluster start = 5 to 7 mins (cloud provisions new machines every time)
With pool: cluster start = 30 seconds (machines already running and waiting!)
